name: atr_ratio_entry_gate
description: Block entries when current ATR is unusually high vs its long-term average — high vol = bear territory
logic: entry_gate: atr[i] / ema(atr, atr_ratio_len)[i] <= atr_ratio_max

name: adx_entry_gate
description: Only enter when ADX confirms a trending market — avoids choppy sideways
logic: entry_gate: adx(adx_len)[i] >= adx_min

name: roc_entry_gate
description: Only enter when price is above where it was N bars ago — confirms upward momentum
logic: entry_gate: close[i] > close[i - roc_len]

name: bear_depth_guard
description: Block re-entry if account equity is far below its recent peak — we're still in a drawdown
logic: entry_gate: equity >= rolling_peak(bear_guard_lookback) * (1 - bear_guard_pct/100)

name: asymmetric_atr_exit
description: Tighten ATR exit multiplier when volatility is elevated — exit faster in high-vol environments
logic: if atr_ratio > threshold: use tighter multiplier for ATR exit

name: vol_spike_exit
description: Exit when volume spikes above average AND price closes down — capitulation signal
logic: exit: volume > ema(volume, vol_spike_len) * vol_spike_mult AND close < prev_close

name: trailing_peak_stop
description: Exit if price drops X% from peak since entry — locks in gains on extended runs
logic: exit: close < peak_since_entry * (1 - trail_drop_pct/100)

name: tema_slope_exit
description: Exit when TEMA slope turns negative — long-term trend reversal signal
logic: exit: (tema[i] - tema[i - lookback]) / lookback < 0

name: bollinger_width_gate
description: Block entries when Bollinger Band width is expanding rapidly — volatility regime shift underway
logic: bb_width = (upper - lower) / sma; entry_gate: bb_width[i] < bb_width_max OR bb_width[i] < bb_width[i - lookback]
implementation: upper = sma(cl, bb_len) + 2*stddev(cl, bb_len); lower = sma - 2*stddev; width = (upper-lower)/sma; gate on width or width expansion rate

name: ema_fan_entry
description: Only enter when short/med/trend EMAs are properly stacked (short > med > trend) — full trend alignment
logic: entry_gate: ema_short > ema_med > ema_trend (all three ordered)
implementation: Simple boolean: ema_short[i] > ema_med[i] AND ema_med[i] > ema_trend[i]. No new indicators needed — uses existing EMAs.

name: macd_histogram_gate
description: Only enter when MACD histogram is positive and rising — confirms momentum acceleration
logic: hist = ema(cl, fast) - ema(cl, slow); signal = ema(hist, signal_len); gate: hist > signal AND hist > hist[1]
implementation: Compute MACD line = ema(fast) - ema(slow), signal = ema(macd, signal_len), histogram = macd - signal. Gate: histogram > 0 AND histogram > histogram[i-1].

name: min_move_reentry
description: After exit, require price to move at least X% before re-entering — prevents whipsaw re-entries
logic: entry_gate: abs(close - last_exit_price) / last_exit_price > min_move_pct/100
implementation: Track last_exit_price. On entry check: abs(cl[i] - last_exit_price) / last_exit_price >= min_move_pct / 100. Reset on each exit.

name: higher_lows_gate
description: Only enter when recent swing lows are rising — structural uptrend confirmation
logic: Find local minima in lookback window, require at least hl_min_count consecutive higher lows
implementation: Scan lo[i-lookback:i] for local minima (lo[j] < lo[j-1] AND lo[j] < lo[j+1]). Collect the last N minima. Gate: each min > previous min for at least hl_min_count.

name: distance_from_mean
description: Block entries when price is extremely far above long-term mean — extended moves snap back on TECL
logic: entry_gate: (close - sma(close, mean_len)) / sma(close, mean_len) * 100 < max_above_pct
implementation: distance_pct = (cl[i] - sma_vals_long[i]) / sma_vals_long[i] * 100. Gate: distance_pct < max_above_pct. Uses a new long SMA.

name: realized_vol_exit
description: Exit when realized volatility spikes — measures actual price movement, not just ATR
logic: rvol = stddev(daily_returns, rvol_len); avg_rvol = ema(rvol, rvol_avg_len); exit: rvol > avg_rvol * rvol_mult
implementation: daily_ret = (cl[i] - cl[i-1]) / cl[i-1]. rvol = rolling stddev of daily_ret over rvol_len. avg_rvol = ema of rvol over rvol_avg_len. Exit when rvol > avg_rvol * rvol_mult.

name: ema_slope_momentum_exit
description: Exit when the trend EMA slope decelerates sharply — trend is losing steam before the cross happens
logic: slope = ema_trend[i] - ema_trend[i-1]; accel = slope - slope_prev_avg; exit: accel < thresh
implementation: slope_now = ema_trend[i] - ema_trend[i-1]; slope_prev = avg of slope over lookback bars; decel = slope_now - slope_prev; exit when decel < thresh.

name: rsi_overbought_exit
description: Exit when RSI reaches overbought extremes — mean reversion risk on leveraged ETF
logic: exit: rsi(rsi_len) > rsi_exit_level
implementation: Standard RSI with Wilder's smoothing. Compute gains/losses arrays, smooth with RMA, RS = avg_gain/avg_loss, RSI = 100 - 100/(1+RS). Exit when RSI > level.

name: volume_dry_up_gate
description: Block entries when volume is abnormally low — thin markets move on noise, not conviction
logic: entry_gate: volume > ema(volume, low_vol_len) * low_vol_min
implementation: Uses existing vol_ema_vals. Gate: vol[i] > vol_ema_vals[i] * low_vol_min.

name: new_high_momentum
description: Only enter near new N-bar highs — breakout confirmation, price making new territory
logic: entry_gate: close > highest(high, breakout_len) * breakout_pct
implementation: Uses existing highest() function. Gate: cl[i] > highest(hi, breakout_len)[i] * breakout_pct. Close to but not necessarily above the N-bar high.

name: consecutive_down_exit
description: Exit after N consecutive down closes — persistent selling pressure, not just a one-bar dip
logic: exit: close[i] < close[i-1] for N consecutive bars
implementation: Track consecutive_down counter. Increment when cl[i] < cl[i-1], reset to 0 otherwise. Exit when counter >= consec_down_bars.
